# INTENT

## User Request

Count how many times one menu/public page is seen on first page load, without counting language changes for now.

## Requested Outcome

Active public page loads should increment a per-project view count that can be shown later in the dashboard.

## Constraints

- MVP only: total view count and last viewed timestamp.
- Count public endpoint loads, not unique visitors.
- Do not count language switches.
- Do not add frontend display yet.

## Open Questions

- None for this pass.
